title: dorycnium broussonetii
intro: Dorycnium broussonetii, also known as the broom-wood or broom clover, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the pea family Fabaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dorycnium broussonetii include its ability to treat various ailments such as sore throats, bronchitis, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, Dorycnium broussonetii can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
